intent: Write a consumer research report about noise-cancelling headphones by cross-referencing TWO sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — find at least 3 noise-cancelling or wireless headphones in the $30-100 range, noting their price, rating, and review summaries; (2) the Reddit /f/technology forum — find posts or comments where users discuss headphone quality, brand preferences, or audio tech. The report must: (a) present each product's specs from the shopping site with citations, (b) identify relevant Reddit discussions and what users actually say about headphone brands or features, (c) synthesize a cross-source verdict — do the shopping site ratings align with Reddit community sentiment? Where do they diverge? Cite every factual claim with a markdown link to the specific shopping product page or Reddit post.
author_notes: Cross-site: shopping (product data) + reddit (community sentiment). DeerFlow's planner should assign separate researchers to each site then have analyst synthesize. Single-agent ReAct must context-switch between sites manually.
